name: generic_visual_focus
description: Creates a family-generic saliency-and-structure focus artifact that highlights prominent foreground objects and preserves horizontal layout for later left/right comparison.
applicability_conditions: Use when a vstar_relative_position question asks whether one named object is to the left or right of another clearly visible object in a natural image, and no object-specific detector is available. This is especially appropriate for generic multiple-choice prompts and for either raw images or intermediate artifacts where preserving scene layout while emphasizing visually prominent object regions will help later localized comparison across varied object categories.
